description: Perform a sensitivity analysis of the US Phillips Curve using the 'usa.gdt' dataset by estimating three OLS models with 'inf' as the dependent variable. Model 1 includes const and inf(-1). Model 2 includes const, inf(-1), and 'gdp_growth' (defined as 100 * diff(log(gdp))). Model 3 includes const, inf(-1), gdp_growth, and gdp_growth(-1). Export a combined LaTeX table of these models to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/phillips_table.tex.
